title: Luxury Resort Editorial Campaign Visual
sourceTitle: Aman Resort Editorial Campaign Poster AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Ultra-premium 4:5 hospitality SMM poster for Aman Resorts x Cillian Murphy, centered on WABI AMAN. Subject: Cillian Murphy wears charcoal linen resort jacket, standing calmly with serene expression in a tranquil resort posture, looking off-camera rather than posing aggressively. Scene: wooden deck overlooking a Kyoto Japanese garden with misty moss-covered stone path and cedar trees provides the fixed Aman Kyoto atmosphere with mist, moss-covered stone path, cedar trees, wooden deck, soft-focus landscape, and Wabi-sabi quietness. Composition: Fixed Instagram hero layout with modern clean AMAN typography occupying the dominant master-visual area, thin border frame, location stamp coordinates, minimal layout marks, centered AMAN typography, and restrained hospitality campaign spacing. Signature Elements: AMAN typography, Wabi-sabi tranquility, Kyoto cedar garden, misty moss-covered stone path, thin border frame, coordinate stamp, warm cream master visual, and minimal hospitality campaign polish. Style: Ultra-premium hospitality SMM poster, Aman resort editorial campaign, Wabi-sabi tranquility, natural stone textures, soft-focus landscapes, minimal margins, Behance front-page quality, and warm cinematic refinement. Color Palette: Fixed Warm Cream, Charcoal, Bamboo Green, and Stone Grey color system with natural wood and moss accents. Lighting: Soft diffused daylight filtering through cedar tree canopy, warm cinematic grading, gentle face highlights, subtle landscape haze, and quiet resort depth. Camera: ARRI Alexa Mini LF, 75mm lens feel, soft depth of field, warm cinematic grading, premium editorial portrait sharpness, and calm hospitality framing. Typography: WABI AMAN appears as the title; modern clean AMAN typography anchors the master visual; AMAN KYOTO | TRANQUILITY AND MINIMALISM | BY RESERVATION appears as compact promotional text in the minimal grid. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。

Utilisez le prompt anglais ci-dessous pour générer l'image ; conservez les textes visibles, les noms de marque, les valeurs de variables et les paramètres en anglais.
